resultList.dtldesc: 3 BHK Flat for Sale in Acacias Shambhavi, Guduvancheri, ChennaiLocated in the steadily developing residential area of Guduvancheri along the GST Road corridor, this spacious three bedroom apartment in Acacias Shambhavi presents a comfortable living opportunity for families seeking a ready-to-move home with convenience and everyday accessibility. Positioned within a low-rise community, the property enjoys a quieter setting compared with high-density developments, while still being connected to key local amenities.Property SpecificationsThe apartment offers a carpet area of 998 sq. ft and is part of a four-storey building. It is situated on the 1st floor, contributing to convenient access without the need to navigate multiple staircases or high-speed lifts. The layout includes three bedrooms, three bathrooms and three balconies, providing generous space and multiple outdoor vantage points for light and ventilation. Additionally, a dedicated puja room adds functional value in line with traditional home planning.The property is semi-furnished, allowing new owners to enjoy essential fixtures while having flexibility to customise interiors. The flooring is finished in ceramic tiles, known for durability and easy maintenance. One covered car parking space is included, ensuring secure vehicle accommodation within the premises. The apartment is freehold and approved by the Directorate of Town  Country Planning, offering clear legal and regulatory standing. With an age of construction between 5 to 10 years, the home has stood the test of time while remaining in a condition suitable for immediate living.FacilitiesAcacias Shambhavi is a modest residential community designed for everyday convenience. The building includes lift access, adding comfort and ease of movement  especially useful for families and visitors. The layout and design focus on practical living, with attention to everyday usability in both common and private spaces.LocalityGuduvancheri is an increasingly popular residential destination in south Chennai, benefiting from its position along the Grand Southern Trunk GST Road and proximity to major employment and education hubs. The area is supported by robust transport connectivity, including the Guduvancheri Railway Station, which provides easy access to central Chennai and neighbouring regions. Daily conveniences such as schools, colleges, healthcare facilities, supermarkets and banks are available within relatively short distances.This 3 BHK apartment in Acacias Shambhavi offers a balanced combination of space, functional design and locality amenities  making it suitable for families, working professionals or buyers seeking a well-connected home with ready possession in Guduvancheri, Chennai.

resultList.dtldesc: Situated next to Infant Jesus School, this ready to move 2 BHK apartment in Pallikaranai, Chennai offers a comfortable residential setting with excellent access to daily conveniences. Located in the Ashok Manor project, the home is ideal for families seeking a practical layout in a well connected neighbourhood.Property SpecificationsThis apartment spans a super built-up area of 1000 sq. ft and is positioned on the third floor of a four storey building. The residence comprises two well proportioned bedrooms and two bathrooms, making it suitable for small to mid sized families. A balcony overlooking the school ground enhances ventilation and brings in ample natural light.The living and dining areas are combined, providing an open and functional layout for everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen is designed in a modular format, although some renovation may be required to suit individual preferences. Vitrified flooring runs across the apartment, ensuring durability and ease of maintenance. The property is East facing and Vastu compliant, adding to its appeal for homebuyers.The apartment is offered unfurnished, allowing buyers to design and furnish the interiors according to their taste. Covered parking is available for two wheelers, while car parking can be arranged on rental basis. The building is equipped with one lift and benefits from 24 hour water supply, 100 percent power backup facility, security guard presence and CCTV surveillance for added safety.FacilitiesResidents have access to essential amenities including lift service, power backup, security and a dedicated kids play area, making it a family friendly environment.LocalityThe property enjoys a prime location in Pallikaranai with key facilities in close proximity. Infant Jesus School is within 100 metres, a hospital is approximately 400 metres away, and the nearest bus stop is also about 400 metres from the building. Shopping areas are located around 200 metres away, ensuring daily needs are easily met. With educational institutions, healthcare centres and transport options nearby, this apartment offers a well balanced and convenient lifestyle in Chennai.
